_comment: #34 installer PR1: provisioning deltas the catalog can't express. repin repoints fragile/dead upstreams to permanent sources; known_licenses fills catalog license gaps with verified upstream licenses (see repin/known_licenses reasons). All resolved via authoritative upstream license review, 2026-07-06.

sd-1-5.reason: runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5 was deleted from HuggingFace; the community mirror is the permanent source.

_mirrors_comment: #34 PR4: optional per-model VS mirror (Cloudflare R2 fallback). Shape: {"<id>": {"base_url": "https://models.vision-studio-x.com/models/<id>", "files": [{"name": ..., "sha256": ..., "bytes": ...}]}}. Only redistributable auto-set members may carry one - the build refuses anything else. Populate at mirror go-live per docs/R2-DELIVERY.md with real uploaded-file hashes; never fabricate.

known_license_reasons.annotator-midas: MiDaS depth (Intel ISL, isl-org/MiDaS) is MIT.
known_license_reasons.annotator-normalbae: Distributed via lllyasviel/Annotators under CreativeML-OpenRAIL-M; upstream Bae normal estimator is permissive.
known_license_reasons.ip-adapter-encoder-clip-vit-l: OpenAI CLIP ViT-L/14 weights are MIT.
known_license_reasons.annotator-openpose: OpenPose body/hand/face weights are CMU academic/non-profit only (commercial requires a paid CMU license); OpenRAIL-M repackaging cannot relicense them - kept Foundry-manual.
